# Meta System

This directory contains the authoritative contracts that define how the Meta Operating System behaves.

## Canonical Files

- `META_INSTRUCTION_PRECEDENCE_CONTRACT.md`
- `META_REPO_OPERATING_PROFILE.md`
- `META_LOAD_ORDER.md`
- `META_PROJECT_RULES.md`
- `META_EXECUTION_PROTOCOL.md`
- `META_PROMPT_EMISSION_CONTRACT.md`
- `META_HOST_ADAPTER_POLICY.md`
- `META_PLUGIN_CONTRACT.md`
- `META_GOLDEN_EXAMPLES_POLICY.md`

## Generated Files

- `instruction-precedence.json`
- `meta-operating-profile.json`
- `META_SYSTEM_REGISTRY.json`
- `mos-capabilities.json`
- `host-adapters/`

## Working Context

The durable repo-local meta context lives under `context/`.
